prompt:
A wooden compost sifter rests over a tub, with fine, dark compost piled below and larger bits left on the mesh. A cured compost bucket sits nearby, lid off, and a pair of gloves lies to the side.

The 512×512 photorealistic solarpunk image focuses on the sifted compost and mesh texture; background planters are softly blurred, and no logos, text, or faces appear.
